brief_html: Leaves chat mode but does not disconnect. Generally sent when entering a game. This is also sent by D2DV/D2XP when switching characters, and by all products when logging off.
remarks_html:
Leaves chat mode but does not disconnect. Generally sent when entering a game. This is also sent by D2DV/D2XP when switching characters, and by all products when logging off.

After you send this, normal chat functions to not work. In order to enter a channel when you are not in chat mode, you must send SID_JOINCHANNEL.
